heading: Omitted
label: 571a, 571b Omitted
notes: CodificationSection 571a, , , , which related to maximum allowance on construction costs, was from the Department of the Interior and Related Agencies Appropriations Act, 1958, and was not repeated in subsequent appropriation acts.Pub.
